title: Implement 5G NR polar codes with CRC-aided SCL decoder
description: Implement polar codes for 5G NR compliance. Includes: bit-channel reliability sorting (Bhattacharyya parameters), information/frozen bit selection, rate-compatible families, successive cancellation (SC) decoder, SC-List (SCL) decoder with path metrics, CRC-aided SCL for improved performance. Validate against 3GPP test vectors. Reuse existing AWGN channel and LLR infrastructure.
